headline: Is Ameriprise Financial (AMP) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Ameriprise Financial is attractively priced at its current level, this article walks through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. The share price closed at US$464.89, with returns of a 1.1% decline over 7 days, a 14.4% decline over 30 days, a 5.8% decline year to date, but gains of 60.7% over 3 years and 122.2% over 5 years, which can change how you think about its risk and reward profile. Recent coverage around Ameriprise Financial has focused on...
